topic: Why Being 'Nice' Is Keeping You Broke
hook_summary: Stop being nice if you want to get rich.

scenes.audio_text: Everyone says be nice and you'll get ahead. That's a lie.
scenes.visual_prompt: @daniel is sitting on a park bench in late afternoon golden hour, medium close-up, camera locked-off, natural backlight, candid documentary style, slight shadows on face.

scenes.audio_text: I used to say yes to every meeting, every favor, every 'let's grab coffee' until I realized I was just giving away my time for free.
scenes.visual_prompt: @daniel walking down a busy city street at midday, over-shoulder shot from behind, motion blur in background, sunlit, candid, real street feel.

scenes.audio_text: The moment I started saying no to everything that didn't pay me or teach me, my income went from $40k to $120k in one year.
scenes.visual_prompt: @daniel leaning against a brick wall in a quiet alley, medium shot, slow push-in, soft diffused light from above, focused expression.

scenes.audio_text: People called me an asshole. But they also started paying me for my time.
scenes.visual_prompt: @daniel sitting at a small cafe table with a coffee cup, half-empty, indoor warm lighting, medium close-up, slight smirk, candid moment.

scenes.audio_text: Nice guys finish last. But the honest ones finish rich.
scenes.visual_prompt: @daniel back on the same park bench, golden hour, wide shot showing the whole scene, camera slowly pulling back, sunset glow, contemplative mood.

loop_back_line: Nice guys finish last. But the honest ones finish rich.
